chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 207 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.625/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.626/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.10.2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Heard learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the material available on record. From perusal of the material, it reflects that in the first instance the remedy was available to the petitioner before the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, whereas, the petitioner has directly approached this Court. The petition being not maintainable is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge ARBROHI
